summary: Iteration 12: Complete testing of backend refactoring (server.py split into 12 route modules) and P1 features. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend P1 features verified working.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) when navigating - charts render correctly but log warnings
Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (minor)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful with admin/admin123
Backend: Casier login successful with casier/casier123
Backend: Invalid login correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/products returns paginated products
Backend: GET /api/categories returns categories
Backend: GET /api/suppliers returns suppliers list
Backend: GET /api/daily/opening-summary returns summary with vanzari_card field (P1 feature)
Backend: GET /api/settings/tva returns TVA settings with 21% default (P1 feature)
Backend: POST /api/cash-operations creates cash operation (sold manual save - P1 feature)
Backend: GET /api/stock/dashboard returns stock dashboard
Backend: GET /api/reports/sales?period=today returns sales report
Backend: GET /api/fiscal/bridge-status returns bridge status
Backend: GET /api/sales returns sales history
Backend: GET /api/nir returns NIR list
Backend: GET /api/held-orders returns held orders
Backend: GET /api/stock/alerts returns stock alerts
Backend: GET /api/ returns API info (v2.0.0)
Frontend: Theme toggle button visible in sidebar (P1 feature)
Frontend: Theme toggle switches between light and dark modes (P1 feature)
Frontend: POS cart persists in localStorage when navigating away (P1 feature)
Frontend: Cash calculator modal appears when clicking NUMERAR button (P1 feature)
Frontend: Cash calculator shows total, input field, and quick amount buttons
Frontend: Receipt details expand when clicking on a receipt in Reports page (P1 feature)
Frontend: Save button visible on Start Day balance input (P1 feature)
Frontend: Manual balance input appears after clicking 'Seteaza sold manual' link
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 2481 lines to 70 lines with 12 route modules
All API endpoints maintained same paths after refactoring - no breaking changes
TVA default correctly set to 21% in /api/settings/tva
Opening summary includes vanzari_card field for card sales tracking
Minor: Chart dimension warnings in console (cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality)
seed_data_creation: Created test cash operation for CASH_IN with 10 RON
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 verified all backend routes work after major refactoring (server.py split into 12 modules). All P1 features tested: (1) TVA default 21% - verified in /api/settings/tva. (2) Save button for starting balance - visible on Start Day page with manual balance input. (3) Persistent POS cart - cart data persists in localStorage key 'andrepau_pos_cart'. (4) Cash calculator modal - appears when clicking NUMERAR with items in cart, shows total, input field, and quick amount buttons (+1, +5, +10, +20, +50, +100, +200, +500). (5) Expandable receipt details - clicking receipt row in Reports page expands to show items. (6) Light/dark theme toggle - button in sidebar toggles 'light' class on document.documentElement. (7) Card sales total on Start Day - shows when vanzari_card > 0 in opening summary.

backend_refactoring.description: All 12 route modules working correctly after server.py split

persistent_pos_cart.description: Cart persists in localStorage across navigation

cash_calculator_modal.trigger: Click NUMERAR button with items in cart
